auth.verifyEmailDesc: We sent a verification link to your email. Click it to activate your account.
auth.signupError: Could not create account. Please try again.

profile.title: Complete Your Profile
profile.subtitle: Tell us about yourself so we can match you with relevant ideas.
profile.interestsHint: Select industries you'd like to evaluate

evaluate.title: Evaluate Ideas
evaluate.subtitle: Help founders validate their ideas with structured feedback.
evaluate.unlockHint: Complete {remaining} more to unlock idea submission
evaluate.unlocked: You can now submit your own idea!
evaluate.q2Label: Would you pay for this solution?
evaluate.q3Label: Is this differentiated from existing solutions?
evaluate.noMoreIdeasDesc: Check back later — new ideas are submitted every day.

submit.title: Submit Your Idea
submit.subtitle: Describe your idea and get validated by real people in 48 hours.
submit.gate: Complete {remaining} more evaluations to unlock submission
submit.problemHint: Describe the problem in detail (50-1000 characters)
submit.targetUserHint: Who specifically has this problem? (20-500 characters)
submit.solutionHint: How does your solution work? (50-1000 characters)
submit.monetizationHint: How will you make money? (20-500 characters)
submit.aiSummaryDesc: This summary will be shown to evaluators.
submit.successDesc: Your idea is now live for 48 hours. Check your dashboard for results.

dashboard.title: Your Ideas
dashboard.subtitle: Track validation results for your submitted ideas.
dashboard.noIdeasDesc: Submit your first idea after evaluating {total} others.

landing.heroSub: Get structured feedback from real founders and builders. No ads, no bias, no cost. Just honest validation powered by community and AI.
landing.howSubtitle: Three simple steps to validate your idea with real human feedback
landing.step1Desc: Help other founders by giving structured feedback on their ideas. Rate problem intensity, payment intent, and differentiation.
landing.step2Desc: Describe your idea in a guided format. AI generates a clear summary for evaluators to review.
landing.step3Desc: Receive weighted scores, feedback themes, and evaluator breakdowns from real people.
landing.featSubtitle: Built for founders who want signal, not noise
landing.feat1Desc: Four-dimensional scoring across problem intensity, payment intent, differentiation, and overall viability.
landing.feat2Desc: Claude AI generates clear idea summaries and clusters feedback into actionable themes.
landing.feat3Desc: Evaluator scores are weighted by experience level and industry match for higher accuracy.
landing.feat4Desc: Track your idea's validation progress with live scores, comment themes, and evaluator breakdowns.
landing.feat5Desc: Reciprocal model ensures every evaluator is also a builder who understands startup challenges.
landing.feat6Desc: Ideas auto-expire after 48 hours, creating urgency and ensuring fresh, timely feedback.
landing.ctaSub: Join a community of founders who believe in real validation. Start evaluating ideas and unlock your own submission.
landing.footerDesc: The open validation engine for startup ideas. Built by founders, for founders.
